steps.title: Spot the confirmation
steps.content: The linguist assumes “own” appears often. The corpus reveals it's the eighth most common adjective—confirming, not contradicting, the assumption.

steps.title: Match validate to this confirmation
steps.content: Validate means to confirm something as true using evidence—exactly what the data does for the assumption. Refute reverses this (disprove), transpose means rearrange, and entail describes a different logical relationship. This matches choice A — A is correct.
